rounds: Two weeks of same-same — routine locked in, nothing new attempted, nothing lost. But the Apollo ring moment? That one stings a little. Someone noticed, someone asked, and you slammed the door. The ring stayed on your finger but you hid the whole story behind it.
pattern: They're quiet until someone actually sees you — then they go loud fast.
focus: One conversation, one detail. Next time someone notices something, give them one true sentence.
